endpoints.name: POST /key
endpoints.description:
Register a new ID `JWT(sub, devtoken)`

v5: `JWT(sub, pk, devtoken, ...)`

See: https://github.com/skion/authentiq/wiki/JWT-Examples

endpoints.name: DELETE /key
endpoints.description:
Revoke an Authentiq ID using email & phone.

If called with `email` and `phone` only, a verification code 
will be sent by email. Do a second call adding `code` to 
complete the revocation.

endpoints.name: GET /key/{PK}
endpoints.description: Get public details of an Authentiq ID.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PK}} with a real pk.

endpoints.name: POST /key/{PK}
endpoints.description:
update properties of an Authentiq ID.
(not operational in v4; use PUT for now)

v5: POST issuer-signed email & phone scopes in
a self-signed JWT

See: https://github.com/skion/authentiq/wiki/JWT-Examples
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PK}} with a real pk.

endpoints.name: PUT /key/{PK}
endpoints.description:
Update Authentiq ID by replacing the object.

v4: `JWT(sub,email,phone)` to bind email/phone hash; 

v5: POST issuer-signed email & phone scopes
and PUT to update registration `JWT(sub, pk, devtoken, ...)`

See: https://github.com/skion/authentiq/wiki/JWT-Examples
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PK}} with a real pk.

endpoints.name: DELETE /key/{PK}
endpoints.description: Revoke an Identity (Key) with a revocation secret
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PK}} with a real pk.

endpoints.name: HEAD /key/{PK}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{PK}} with a real pk.

endpoints.name: GET /scope/{job}
endpoints.description: get the status / current content of a verification job
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOB}} with a real job.

endpoints.name: POST /scope/{job}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOB}} with a real job.

endpoints.name: PUT /scope/{job}
endpoints.description:
authority updates a JWT with its signature
See: https://github.com/skion/authentiq/wiki/JWT-Examples
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOB}} with a real job.

endpoints.name: DELETE /scope/{job}
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOB}} with a real job.

endpoints.name: HEAD /scope/{job}
endpoints.description: HEAD to get the status of a verification job
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{JOB}} with a real job.
